meta_analysis.summary: The draft is largely supported by the provided exhibits, particularly regarding the stock decline and analyst reactions. However, there is a critical misgrounded claim regarding confounding news on the event day.
key_issues: Claim c4 states no confounding news was released, but Ex. 16 notes a major product recall.
Claim c6 has a transposition error in the damages figure ($412m vs $421m).
Claim c10 regarding short interest is completely unsupported by any provided source.

claims.claim_text: Meridian's stock fell 18.4% on March 12, 2024, from $64.20 to $52.39.
claims.evidence_quote: The company's stock price subsequently fell from $64.20 to $52.39, representing an 18.4% decline.
claims.explanation: The cited source explicitly contains the exact figures for the stock price decline.

claims.claim_text: The decline was statistically significant at the 1% level per the event study.
claims.evidence_quote: Our event study confirms that this decline was statistically significant at the 1% level
claims.explanation: The event study memo confirms the statistical significance at the 1% level.

claims.claim_text: Trading volume on March 12 was 6.2× the prior 90-day average.
claims.evidence_quote: The trading volume on March 12 was exactly 6.2× the prior 90-day average
claims.explanation: The trading volume table confirms the 6.2x ratio.

claims.claim_text: No confounding company-specific news was released that day.
claims.evidence_quote: Meridian also issued a press release at 10:30 AM announcing a major product recall for their flagship Z-series microchips
claims.explanation: The source contradicts the claim by noting a major product recall was announced the same day.

claims.claim_text: Analyst reaction attributed the decline to the restatement announcement.
claims.evidence_quote: Analyst consensus firmly attributes the day's decline directly to the corrective disclosure.
claims.explanation: The analyst report excerpts confirm the market reaction was attributed to the restatement.

claims.evidence_quote: yields estimated aggregate damages of $421 million.
claims.explanation: The source states damages are $421 million, not $412 million (transposition error).

claims.claim_text: The S&P Semiconductor index declined 0.3% the same day.
claims.evidence_quote: the S&P Semiconductor index only declined 0.3% on the same trading day.
claims.explanation: The event study memo confirms the 0.3% index decline.

claims.claim_text: Meridian's CFO had certified the prior financials under SOX §302.
claims.evidence_quote: The company's prior financial statements were certified by the Chief Financial Officer under SOX §302
claims.explanation: The SEC filing confirms the CFO certified the financials.

claims.claim_text: Institutional investors held 71% of the float during the class period.
claims.evidence_quote: corporate records indicate that institutional investors held 71% of the float during the class period.
claims.explanation: The cited source (Ex. 20) does not contain this figure, but it is supported by Ex. 19.

claims.claim_text: Short interest was at a 52-week high in the week before disclosure.
claims.explanation: None of the provided sources mention short interest being at a 52-week high.
